reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate WHOOP
reauth_confirm.description: Please reauthenticate with your WHOOP account.

abort.reauth_unsuccessful: Re-authentication failed: could not verify your WHOOP account. Please try again.
abort.wrong_account: The authorized WHOOP account does not match this entry. Reauthenticate with the original account, or remove this entry and add the other account separately.

init.title: WHOOP Options
init.description: Configure display units for duration and energy sensors. Select "Manual" for duration to configure units per-entity in Home Assistant's entity settings.
